Off Calendar Apr-16-2026 Set For Case Management Conference On Jun-17-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Nov-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance.

As the motion is unopposed, the motion is granted without leave to amend.

Proposed order submitted.

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/DH)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2025 Continued To Apr-20-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Sep-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in its Requests for Admission, Set One, is granted. Defendant Chiu Y. Leung failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (Code Civ. Proc., section 2033.280, subd. (a).) The truth of any matters specified in the RFAs, Set Two, is deemed admitted by Plaintiff. (Id. section 2033.280, subds. (b), (c).)
Wells Fargo does not seek sanctions, but Code of Civil Procedure, section 2033.280, subdivision (c) further provides: "It is mandatory that the court impose a monetary sanction under Chapter 7 (commencing with Section 2023.010) on the party or attorney, or both, whose failure to serve a timely response to requests for admission necessitated this motion." The court awards sanctions of $50 payable by Leung to Wells Fargo within 30 days of notice of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

***** Minute order amended on 9/9/2025 to correct a typo. The last sentence on the first paragraph should read "The truth of any matters specified in the RFAs, Set Two, is deemed admitted by Leung. (Id. section 2033.280, subds. (b), (c).)". *****

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Set For Trial On Oct-20-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
